---
name: Bug report
about: Something broken? Tell us.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what went wrong.

**Command you ran**
```bash
fortune check https://github.com/owner/repo --sample 1000
```

**Expected behaviour**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual behaviour**
What actually happened (include the full error message).

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / macOS 14 / Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- Fortune version: [run `fortune version`]
- Token used: yes / no (do NOT share the token itself)

**Additional context**
Anything else that might help.
